en: could do to this family,
ko: 이 가족에게 할 수 있는 일이지만,

en: but if it's the only real choice we have,
if it's either that or you getting shot when you open your front door.
ko: 당신이 현관문을 열 때 총에 맞는 것과 그 중 하나라면.

en: I don't want to hear about the police.
You're not some hardened criminal, Walt.
You are in over your head.  That's what we tell them.
ko: 당신은 이미 깊은 수렁에 빠졌어. 그게 우리가 그들에게 말하는 거야.

en: That's the truth.  No, it's not the truth.
Of course it is.
School teacher, cancer, desperate for money.
Okay, we're done.
Roped into working for, unable to even quit.
You told me that yourself, Walt.
Jesus, what was I thinking?
ko: 제기랄, 내가 뭘 생각하고 있었던 거지?

en: Walt, please, let's both of us
stop trying to justify this whole thing
ko: 이 모든 것을 정당화하려고 하지 말고

en: and admit you're in danger.
ko: 당신이 위험에 처해 있다는 걸 인정하자.

en: Who are you talking to right now?
Who is it you think you see?
Do you know how much I make a year?
I mean, even if I told you, you wouldn't believe it.
ko: 내가 말해도 당신은 믿지 않을 거야.

en: Do you know what would happen
if I suddenly decided to stop going into work?
A business big enough that it could be listed on the NASDAQ goes.
ko: NASDAQ에 상장될 수 있을 만큼 큰 사업이 사라져.
